title: K2 Airways Boeing 737 Cargo Plane Crash in Arabian Sea
summary: A K2 Airways cargo plane carrying five crew members lost contact with air traffic control while flying from Sharjah to Karachi on July 7-8, 2026, after reporting a navigational system problem, with wreckage subsequently located in the Arabian Sea.

events.chapter_summary: A K2 Airways Boeing 737-400 cargo plane with five crew members disappeared on July 7, 2026, while flying from Sharjah to Karachi after reporting a navigational system problem and entering a rapid descent approximately 155 nautical miles west of Karachi, with wreckage located in the Arabian Sea but crew members remaining missing.
Pakistani naval and maritime forces located the aircraft wreckage approximately 53 nautical miles south of Ormara after a 12-hour search, with all five crew members remaining missing.
